name: Lennar Mortgage, LLC San Diego
description_short: Lennar Mortgage San Diego specializes in financing new construction homes from Lennar Family of Builders. They offer pre-qualification, digital mortgage applications, and personalized loan officer support.
description_long:
Lennar Mortgage, LLC is the mortgage lending division of the Lennar Family of Builders and has been operating for over 50 years. The San Diego branch (NMLS #1873435) is located at 13520 Evening Creek Dr. N. Suite 600B and serves homebuyers in the San Diego area. The company positions itself as a trusted partner specifically for buyers purchasing new construction homes from Lennar builders, differentiating itself from traditional mortgage lenders by understanding builder financing workflows.

The San Diego branch offers pre-qualification services, digital mortgage applications, and full loan processing for home purchases. Their team includes four licensed loan officers: Steven Aguilera (NMLS #1450852), Rick Grewal (NMLS #480018), Lee Grzeskowiak (NMLS #656223), and Felice Taylor (NMLS #450268). They provide guidance to first-time homebuyers through educational resources like their First-Time Homebuyers' Guide. The company emphasizes routing customers to the appropriate loan officer based on whether they are purchasing from Lennar Family of Builders or other builders.

Lennar Mortgage distinguishes itself through its integration with Lennar's builder network and deep expertise in new construction financing. The company provides direct support from local loan officers with established NMLS credentials and offers digital-first mortgage origination. Their marketing emphasizes trust, informed decision-making, and specialized knowledge of the new construction mortgage process rather than competing on rates.

The main limitation is that Lennar Mortgage is optimized for and primarily targets buyers purchasing from Lennar Family of Builders, not the general mortgage market. Borrowers seeking mortgages for existing homes or refinances from non-Lennar properties may find this branch less suitable. The website provides limited detail on specific loan programs, rates, or terms available.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Over 50 years of mortgage lending experience in the industry
Four dedicated licensed loan officers available with published NMLS credentials
Digital mortgage application process for streamlined origination
Specialized expertise in new construction home financing through Lennar builders
Free First-Time Homebuyers' Guide available for educational support
Local San Diego branch with direct phone and email support
Routing system to match borrowers with appropriate loan officers based on builder affiliation
cons: Primary focus on Lennar Family of Builders creates potential bias or limited loan options for non-Lennar purchases
Website lacks specific information on loan programs, APR ranges, or terms available
No mention of refinancing options or reverse mortgages despite those being common mortgage products
Limited transparency on fees, down payment requirements, or credit score minimums
No comparison tools, calculators, or rate quotes available on the website
best_for: First-time homebuyers purchasing new construction from Lennar Family of Builders in San Diego
Lennar buyer customers seeking pre-qualification and guidance through the mortgage process
Borrowers wanting personalized local loan officer support rather than online-only lending
diagnosis: Lennar Mortgage San Diego is best for first-time and experienced homebuyers purchasing new construction from Lennar Family of Builders who value local loan officer relationships and builder-integrated financing. The primary caveat is that this lender is builder-focused rather than a general-market mortgage provider, and the website lacks transparency on specific loan programs, rates, and terms that borrowers need to evaluate offers.
services: Mortgage pre-qualification for new home purchases
New construction financing for Lennar builder homes
Personalized loan routing to appropriate loan officers
Mortgage support for non-Lennar builder purchases
Home purchase financial guidance and options review
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 13520 Evening Creek Dr N Suite 600B, San Diego, CA 92128
